# BuildWorkPro

> BuildWorkPro is construction project management software built specifically for trade subcontractors — electrical, plumbing, HVAC, roofing, concrete, framing, glazing, and other specialty contractors. One flat price ($79/month or $790/year), unlimited users and projects, all features included, 14-day free trial with no credit card required.

BuildWorkPro covers the full subcontractor workflow: bidding and estimating with line items, labor rates, and markup; AIA-style pay applications with schedule of values; change orders with approval workflows; project management with phases, tasks, and Gantt charts; daily site logs; time tracking; a sales pipeline and CRM; document management; and reporting. It is web-based and works on phones, tablets, and desktops.

Unlike platforms built for general contractors (Procore) or residential home builders (Buildertrend), BuildWorkPro is priced and designed for specialty subcontractors: flat pricing instead of construction-volume quotes, self-serve signup instead of sales demos, and workflows centered on sub-to-GC billing rather than owner-facing portals.

## Product

- [Features overview](https://buildworkpro.com/features/): All modules at a glance
- [Bidding & estimating](https://buildworkpro.com/features/construction-bidding/): Line-item bids, labor rates, markup, PDF proposals, bid-to-project conversion
- [Pay applications](https://buildworkpro.com/features/pay-applications/): AIA-style progress billing with schedule of values, retainage, and approval workflow
- [Change orders](https://buildworkpro.com/features/change-orders/): Scoped and priced change orders with approval tracking
- [Project management](https://buildworkpro.com/features/project-management/): Phases, tasks, dependencies, Gantt charts
- [Site logs](https://buildworkpro.com/features/site-logs/): Daily reports with personnel, work performed, materials, issues, and photos
- [Time tracking](https://buildworkpro.com/features/time-tracking/): Crew hours by project and cost code
- [Construction CRM](https://buildworkpro.com/features/construction-crm/): Leads, pipeline stages, contacts
- [Reports](https://buildworkpro.com/features/reports/): Win rates, billing status, project profitability

## Who it's for

- [Solutions overview](https://buildworkpro.com/solutions/): By trade
- [Electrical contractors](https://buildworkpro.com/solutions/electrical-contractors/)
- [Plumbing contractors](https://buildworkpro.com/solutions/plumbing-contractors/)
- [HVAC contractors](https://buildworkpro.com/solutions/hvac-contractors/)
- [Roofing contractors](https://buildworkpro.com/solutions/roofing-contractors/)
- [Concrete contractors](https://buildworkpro.com/solutions/concrete-contractors/)
- [Framing contractors](https://buildworkpro.com/solutions/framing-contractors/)

## Comparisons

- [BuildWorkPro vs Procore](https://buildworkpro.com/compare/procore-alternative/): Procore alternative for subcontractors
- [BuildWorkPro vs Buildertrend](https://buildworkpro.com/compare/buildertrend-alternative/): Buildertrend alternative for trade contractors

## Documentation

- [Product docs](https://buildworkpro.com/docs/): Guides for every module
- [Developer docs & REST API](https://buildworkpro.com/api/): API keys, webhooks, OpenAPI reference
- [MCP integration](https://buildworkpro.com/api/mcp/overview/): Connect Claude and ChatGPT to BuildWorkPro

## Pricing

- $79/month or $790/year (two months free on annual billing)
- Unlimited users, unlimited projects, all features included — no per-user fees, no tiers, no add-on modules
- 14-day free trial, no credit card required, cancel anytime
